response: The scrum master’s sprint retrospective notes document two key successes—shipping the auth redesign on time and strong cross-team collaboration with the design team—and two areas needing improvement: excessive context switches from working on 3 different projects and standups running 25 minutes (10 minutes over the 15-minute target). The action items outlined in the retrospective are capping each developer’s work in progress (WIP) at 2 items and using timeboxed standups with a parking lot to address the identified process pain points.
